response: <<Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs.>> <<On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town.>> <<On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog they had found.>> <<On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each.>> *** <<The total number of dogs she currently has is [25 + 4 + 1 + 6].>> <<The total number of dogs she currently has is [25 + 4 + 1 + 6] and the final count is [25 + 4 + 1 + 6] cost.>>
